name: Cloudform
descriptionSeed: Impossible geometry and buildings that are arguments. Cloudform resists being mapped, not out of malice but because a map is a coarse instrument and the Figurists find your attachment to matter a bit provincial. They are brilliant, delightful, and genuinely do not understand why anyone would care what a thing is MADE of. Cloudform's waygate is drawn rather than built, and the Figurists renew the figure each season. It has never failed, which they consider proof, and everyone else considers luck.
encounterFlavor: Figurists making an argument you can walk through; a room that is a proposition; a Mason envoy visibly furious and unable to say why.
questSeeds: A figure has been made that is doing something nobody intended and cannot be unmade
Cloudform has begun to lose its purchase on matter entirely, and people are noticing they cannot leave
worldPosNote: Deep expression of its Reach — placed near the equator on the the_pattern_reach bearing. (SNG-180: authored position — WHERE it sits. Independent of axisVector, which is WHAT it is; a bastion is where the two disagree.)
